description: Realm Divided Patch 5 (11 March 2026) — Season 30 Winner Statues Unveiled, Conqueror’s Challenge Changes, Avalonian Boss Changes, Faction Warfare Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Conqueror’s Challenge Changes

items.text: Medium Chest: 225,000 → 300,000
Gold Legacy Avatar Set: 300,000 → 450,000
Crystal Avatar Set: 680,000 → 1,000,000

sections.searchable_text: Conqueror’s Challenge Changes 8% Fame buff: 175,000 → 200,000 Medium Chest: 225,000 → 300,000 Gold Legacy Avatar Set: 300,000 → 450,000 10% Fame buff: 450,000 → 700,000 Crystal Avatar Set: 680,000 → 1,000,000 Big Chest: 1,000,000 → 1,500,000

sections.heading: Avalonian Boss Changes

items.text: Avalonian Crystal Basilisk

subitems.text: Damage reduction on the Crystal Basilisk from Overcharged has been halved
Cleanse no longer applies the Holy Fire effect

items.text: Avalonian Archmage

subitems.text: Orb and Laser damage reduced by 15%
Orb phases have been delayed from 60% of max health to 40%
Additional Tornados will now be created at 60% and 20% health (previously 66% and 33%)

items.text: All other bosses

subitems.text: Physical armor reduced to align with magic resistance
As a result of this change, weapons which deal physical damage will see an increase in damage

sections.searchable_text: Avalonian Boss Changes Avalonian Crystal Basilisk Health reduced by 35% Auto-attack damage reduced by 26% Damage reduction on the Crystal Basilisk from Overcharged has been halved Cleanse no longer applies the Holy Fire effect Avalonian Archmage Health reduced by 29% Orb and Laser damage reduced by 15% Orb phases have been delayed from 60% of max health to 40% Additional Tornados will now be created at 60% and 20% health (previously 66% and 33%) All other bosses Health reduced by 20% Physical armor reduced to align with magic resistance

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes

subsections.heading: Faction Enlistment Bonus

items.text: The maximum Faction Enlistment Bonus that can be received has been increased from 150% to 200%
The penalties for moving to a Faction with a higher Enlistment Bonus have been substantially reduced

subitems.text: The maximum Faction Standing that can be retained after a move has been increased from 240,000 to 1,000,000
The amount of Faction Standing that is lost when changing Factions has been reduced
These penalties are based on the strength of the Faction being moved to, with lower penalties for weaker Factions

subsections.searchable_text: Faction Enlistment Bonus The maximum Faction Enlistment Bonus that can be received has been increased from 150% to 200% The penalties for moving to a Faction with a higher Enlistment Bonus have been substantially reduced The maximum Faction Standing that can be retained after a move has been increased from 240,000 to 1,000,000 The amount of Faction Standing that is lost when changing Factions has been reduced These penalties are based on the strength of the Faction being moved to, with lower penalties for weaker Factions

subsections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: The area within which players are eligible to receive Fortress Chest rewards has been increased, in order to include players defending the Fortress walls
Lethal Faction Battle Standards can now be carried between red zone regions via tunnels

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes The area within which players are eligible to receive Fortress Chest rewards has been increased, in order to include players defending the Fortress walls Lethal Faction Battle Standards can now be carried between red zone regions via tunnels

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this release can be found here .
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this release can be found here .

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: Spell Fixes

items.text: Fury (Soldier Armor): Fixed issue where the description was incorrect in some languages
Force of Nature (Bedrock Mace): Fixed issue where the description stated the incorrect range
Bloody Reap (Infernal Scythe): Fixed issue where the second swing could be broken by DoT removals (eg. Guardian Helmet's Emergency Shield)
Sinister Swipes (Prowling Staffs): Fixed issue where the third hit execute would not be triggered if recast towards the end of the time window

subsections.searchable_text: Spell Fixes Fury (Soldier Armor): Fixed issue where the description was incorrect in some languages Force of Nature (Bedrock Mace): Fixed issue where the description stated the incorrect range Bloody Reap (Infernal Scythe): Fixed issue where the second swing could be broken by DoT removals (eg. Guardian Helmet's Emergency Shield) Sinister Swipes (Prowling Staffs): Fixed issue where the third hit execute would not be triggered if recast towards the end of the time window

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the Faction Transport UI would sometimes show no available destinations in the dropdown
Fixed issue where opening and closing the Party Finder repeatedly could cause the UI to break
Fixed issue where, after leveling-up the Seasoned Tracker Destiny Board node, excess Fame would not be carried to the new level
Fixed issue where it was possible to ping maps outside a player’s current region

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where the Faction Transport UI would sometimes show no available destinations in the dropdown Fixed issue where opening and closing the Party Finder repeatedly could cause the UI to break Fixed issue where, after leveling-up the Seasoned Tracker Destiny Board node, excess Fame would not be carried to the new level Fixed issue where it was possible to ping maps outside a player’s current region

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: [MOBILE] Fixed issue where it was sometimes not possible to skip the intro video
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
